canonicalRule: Additional GitHub Enterprise seats solve capacity only. Cross-repo execution requires accepted org membership, repo/team write permission, and token or GitHub App scope for each target repo.
knownCrossRepoBlocker: Previous direct pushes to sibling repos returned 403 from this runtime.
requiredTokenScopes: Contents: Read and write for each target repo
Pull requests: Read and write when PR creation should be direct
Workflows: Read and write only when workflow files are edited
SSO authorization for szl-holdings when using a PAT
githubAppRequirements: App installed on every target repo
Workflow write permission only when editing workflow files

targetRepos.phaseUnlocked: org profile, reusable workflows, coordination issues/PR templates
targetRepos.currentFallback: mirror coordination status and proxy instructions in a11oy

targetRepos.phaseUnlocked: direct Lean proof patching and CI repair
targetRepos.currentFallback: a11oy proxy patch queue with build logs

targetRepos.phaseUnlocked: direct mesh pointer and UDS topology updates
targetRepos.currentFallback: a11oy UDS frontier docs and proxy status
a11oy anatomy/formula map and UDS proof-point references
a11oy action-contract and controls evidence map
a11oy receipt substrate and anatomy map
a11oy investor demo and ecosystem readiness report

targetRepos.phaseUnlocked: product integration monorepo changes when in scope
targetRepos.currentFallback: standalone a11oy package and payload validation

doctrineBoundaries: Do not claim sibling repo operational completion until repo-native tests and CI pass.
Do not claim all Lean green without current proof report.
Do not claim Defense Unicorns endorsement or UDS catalog acceptance.
Do not commit tokens or secrets.
Do not merge to protected branches without explicit approval.
